items.name: Command Palette
items.description: Opens the command palette, allowing you to run commands quickly.

items.name: Open File
items.description: Quickly opens a file by typing part of its name.

items.name: Split Editor
items.description: Splits the editor into multiple views.

items.name: Find
items.description: Finds text within the current file.

items.name: Replace
items.description: Replaces text within the current file.

items.name: Go to Line
items.description: Jumps to a specific line number.

items.name: Comment Line
items.description: Toggles commenting for the current line.

items.name: Open Integrated Terminal
items.description: Opens or hides the integrated terminal.

items.name: Format Document
items.description: Formats the entire document based on the language rules.

items.name: Rename Symbol
items.description: Renames all occurrences of a symbol.

items.name: Zoom In/Out
items.shortcut: Ctrl+= or Ctrl+- (Windows/Linux), Cmd+= or Cmd+- (Mac)
items.description: Zooms in or out of the editor view.
